name: tamarind-mcp
description: Run Tamarind Bio scientific workflows through the authenticated Tamarind MCP server without installing the CLI.

interface.shortDescription: Fold, dock, design, and screen through Tamarind MCP
interface.longDescription: Use Tamarind Bio through its authenticated remote MCP server to discover live tools, validate and estimate settings, submit and monitor jobs, inspect outputs, run batches, and orchestrate dependent scientific workflows. This plugin is independent of the Tamarind CLI plugin.
defaultPrompt: Fold this complex through Tamarind MCP
Dock this ligand through Tamarind MCP
Design and screen binders through Tamarind MCP
